name: backend-dev
description: Implement backend APIs (REST/GraphQL), services, business logic, DTOs with validation, middleware, and authentication. Generates RPA tests for endpoints. Triggers on: api, backend, service, endpoint, implement, controller, middleware, dto, พัฒนา, แบ็คเอนด์, เอพีไอ, สร้าง api. Replaces backend-develo
